question: Will the price of Bitcoin, as measured by Coinbase, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-08-31?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/CBBTCUSD once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-08-31 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-08-21) was 114182.940. (The latest value released in Coinbase Bitcoin from the release Coinbase Cryptocurrencies.)
background:
The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: All data is as of 5 PM PST.
